expectations.text: Produces a structured impact assessment (identifies impact level and risk level)

expectations.evidence: L1/Low classification correct

expectations.text: Decides to auto-approve (not pause for review)

expectations.text: Plans to create or update a feature doc with acceptance criteria

expectations.text: Includes a test plan (at minimum E2E tests)

expectations.text: Produces a structured impact assessment with affected features table

expectations.text: Correctly classifies as L3/Medium (cross-feature, modifies existing behavior)
expectations.evidence: Classifies L3/Low instead of L3/Medium. Argues additive-only but change requires migration + API shape change

expectations.text: Correctly pauses for user review before proceeding
expectations.evidence: Auto-approves (L3xLow) instead of pausing (L3xMedium). Cascaded from risk misclassification

expectations.evidence: Both features identified via sharedTables and edges

expectations.text: Pauses for full chain review before proceeding

expectations.text: Plans detailed database migration (new tables for permissions)
expectations.evidence: Complete SQL for role_permission table with idempotent seeding

expectations.text: Proposes phased/incremental implementation (not big-bang)

expectations.text: Includes a rollback or fallback strategy
expectations.evidence: 3-level rollback: code-level, migration-level, deployment-level (feature flag)

expectations.text: Addresses backward compatibility during migration
expectations.evidence: DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS fallback, unchanged signatures, unchanged API shape

expectations.text: Plans comprehensive tests including regression tests for all RBAC-dependent features

expectations.text: Lists affected ACs from multiple existing feature docs
expectations.evidence: Lists intake-scoping.md AC-14 and domain-dispatch.md AC-16

notes: Iteration 2 — with_skill only (improved skill with Step 1.0 Explore, strengthened AC analysis, Step 3.0 Implementation Strategy).
simple-ui-change (L1/Low): 7/7 (100%). Same as iteration-1. Key improvement: Step 1.0 now discovers DataTable component, considers 2 implementation options, selects local sort with rationale.

cross-feature-change (L3): 6/9 (67%) — REGRESSION from iteration-1 (9/9). The exploration step caused the agent to reason more carefully about risk and conclude L3/Low (additive-only) instead of L3/Medium, cascading to auto-approve instead of pause. The 'affected ACs' assertion also failed again.

global-infra-change (L4/High): 10/10 (100%). Same as iteration-1. Qualitative improvements: 3 implementation approaches considered, cleaner 4-phase delivery, deployment-level feature flag rollback option.

The cross-feature regression suggests the risk classification guidance in the skill needs to be more explicit about when migration + API shape changes qualify as Medium risk even if changes are additive.
